message:
test(metamorphic): search invariants (idempotence, limit prefix, agent union, days subset)

8 metamorphic relations verify search correctness without an oracle:
MR1 idempotence, MR2 limit-prefix monotonicity, MR3 agent-filter union
completeness, MR4 reindex idempotence, MR5 days-filter subset ordering,
MR6 case invariance, MR7 offset pagination consistency, MR8 agent-filter
exclusivity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
